title: Replace custom student login with Internet Identity authentication

requirements.summary: Replace custom student login form with Internet Identity button and implement approval-based access control
acceptanceCriteria: The student login section shows only an Internet Identity login button — no email field, no unique code field, no password field
Clicking the Internet Identity button initiates the Internet Identity auth flow via useInternetIdentity hook
After successful Internet Identity login, an approved student is redirected to the student dashboard
After successful Internet Identity login, a non-approved student sees a pending approval message and is not redirected to the dashboard
Admin login section (email-only, mrjain950761@gmail.com) is completely unchanged

file_operations.description: Remove the custom student login form (email + unique code fields). Replace with an Internet Identity login button that uses the useInternetIdentity hook to trigger authentication. After successful login, call the backend's isCallerApproved() method to check approval status. If approved, redirect to /student/dashboard. If not approved, display a message stating 'Your account is pending admin approval. Please wait for confirmation.' Keep the admin login section (email-only for mrjain950761@gmail.com) completely unchanged. Use the authorization component to support the approval check.

requirements.summary: Update student route guards and layout to use Internet Identity principal instead of localStorage custom auth
acceptanceCriteria: Student routes are protected by Internet Identity login state (isAuthenticated from useInternetIdentity)
Unauthenticated access to student routes redirects to the login page
Logout in StudentLayout calls the Internet Identity logout function and redirects to login
Admin routes and AdminLayout are completely unchanged

file_operations.description: Update student route guards to check Internet Identity authentication state (isAuthenticated from useInternetIdentity hook) instead of localStorage-based custom auth tokens. For all student routes under /student/, add a beforeLoad guard that redirects unauthenticated users to /login. Do not modify admin route guards or any routes under /admin/.

Replace the sidebar logout button's onClick handler to call the Internet Identity logout function from useInternetIdentity hook (clear() method), then redirect to /login. Remove any references to localStorage-based auth tokens or unique codes. Do not modify the navigation links or notification bell. Verify the component's usage instructions for the authorization component before implementing.

Remove or deprecate any helper functions that retrieve student authentication state from localStorage (e.g., getCurrentStudentId if it relies on custom tokens). Keep the isAdmin helper unchanged as it is used for admin authentication. Add a comment indicating that student authentication now relies on Internet Identity principal from useInternetIdentity hook.
